authors.author: Annie Louisa Coghill
Lowell Mason
Auf, denn die Nacht wird kommen

verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: Work, for the night is coming: Work through the sunny noon; Fill brightest hours with labor: Rest comes sure and soon. Give every flying minute Something to keep in store; Work, for the night is coming, When man works no more.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Work, for the night is coming, Under the sunset skies; While their bright tints are glowing, Work, for daylight flies. Work till the last beam fadeth, Fadeth to shine no more; Work, while the night is darkening, When man's work is o'er.
